linapro-storage-s3.name: Object Storage - S3
linapro-storage-s3.description: Provides an S3 protocol object storage backend (MinIO, R2, Ceph RGW, and similar) for the host Storage domain capability.

settings.description: Enter the endpoint, access keys, and bucket for your S3-compatible service (for example MinIO, R2, or Ceph). Enable only one cloud storage plugin at a time. If the configuration is incomplete, object storage operations will fail—the system will not automatically switch to local disk. For official AWS S3, use the AWS S3 plugin instead.
settings.accessKeyIdHelp: Access key identity used by the S3 endpoint.
settings.secretAccessKeyHelp: Secret key. Leave empty to keep the previously saved value.
settings.secretAccessKeyKeepPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep the saved secret
settings.endpointHelp: Required S3 API endpoint URL (for example http://minio:9000 or https://…r2.cloudflarestorage.com).
settings.regionHelp: Optional SigV4 signing region. Leave empty to use us-east-1. Most self-hosted endpoints ignore physical region.
settings.pathPrefixHelp: Optional key prefix applied under the host-scoped object key.
settings.forcePathStyleHelp: Use path-style addressing (required by many MinIO and self-hosted S3 endpoints).
settings.corsNote: Browser direct upload/download requires the bucket CORS policy to allow your workbench origin, methods PUT/GET/POST (as needed), and headers such as Content-Type and Authorization/x-ms-* when applicable.
